_comment: EXAMPLE PROFILE — Vineet Ravi / Mangotec LLC. Copy to ~/.eva/user_profile.json and customize. Generated by EVA Onboarding Workflow.

user.name: Vineet Ravi
user.philosophy: Logic maps the road. Intuition feels the turn. Faith takes the step.

voice.style: Short sentences. One idea per line. Breathing room between thoughts. Contrast before conclusion. Dry wit, never sarcasm. Never sell — demonstrate. Numbers are specific. End on quiet confidence, not a call to arms. The best posts feel like something overheard, not broadcast.

examples.context: Introducing EVA vs other AI tools
examples.post:
Perplexity answers questions.
Claude thinks through problems.

Both are exceptional.

Both still need you to drive.

I built EVA for people who just want to show up and work.

Every morning — before you open your laptop — EVA has already scanned your inbox, pulled your calendar, surfaced your deals, and told you what matters today.

No prompts. No setup. No developer needed.

You don't build the system.
You just use it.

That's the difference.

→ eva-waitlist.mangotec.ai

*(First 200. I read every request personally.)*

A little context on why I built this —

I kept buying AI tools. Each one brilliant at one thing. None of them talking to each other. None of them running without me.

One morning I thought: what if the system just ran?

That question became EVA.

Drop a 🌱 and I'll personally send you early access.

Looked at 3 deals this week.

Two failed on one metric: $10K/month net after debt service.

One didn't. Michigan-based wellness SaaS. $9,154/month. USA. Seller motivated.

EVA flagged it at 6:47am before I'd opened my laptop.

That's the only metric that matters right now.

Not the multiple. Not the niche. The net.

#Acquisition #OnlineBusiness #EVA #BuildingInPublic

business.product: EVA — autonomous AI operating system for solopreneurs and operators
business.target_audience: ETA searchers, solopreneur operators, acquisition entrepreneurs
